---
title: "Contact Me"
about:
    template: jolla
    links: 
      - text: Personal Email
        icon: envelope
        href: mailto:keilyperla36@gmail.com
      - text: Student Email
        icon: envelope
        href: mailto:keiperla@bu.edu
      - text: LinkedIn
        icon: linkedin 
        href: www.linkedin.com/in/keily-perla-6505222b3
      - text: Resume
        icon: file-text
        href: Keily_Perla_Resume.pdf 
---

Please use one of the following links to connect with me:

Feel free to send me an email, add me on LinkedIn, or download my up-to-date resume.

**Thank you for stopping by my Quarto website!**
